heading: Report on privatization of RFE/RL, Incorporated
label: 6544 Report on privatization of RFE/RL, Incorporated
notes: Change of NameBroadcasting Board of Governors renamed United States Agency for Global Media pursuant to . The renaming was effectuated by notice to congressional appropriations committees dated , and became effective .section 6204(a)(21) of this titleMay 24, 2018Aug. 22, 2018

children.text: Efforts by RFE/RL, Incorporated, to terminate individual language services.
A detailed description of steps taken with regard to .section 6211(a) of this title
An analysis of prospects for privatization over the coming year.

An assessment of the extent to which United States Government funding may be appropriate in the year 2000 and subsequent years for surrogate broadcasting to the countries to which RFE/RL, Incorporated, broadcast during the year. This assessment shall include an analysis of the environment for independent media in those countries, noting the extent of government control of the media, the ability of independent journalists and news organizations to operate, relevant domestic legislation, level of government harassment and efforts to censor, and other indications of whether the people of such countries enjoy freedom of expression.
